title: DONE: P8 Slice B committed
body: Nebulous Slice B landed as 6e804485 (feat(agent-tools): harden p8 tui interactions). Exact bundle only: agent-tools/src/collaboration-state/tui/controller.ts and agent-tools/tests/collaboration-state/tui-app.unit.test.ts. Proofs: focused tui-app Vitest 1 file/6 tests passed after formatting; commit hook passed prettier-staged, markdownlint-staged, repo validators, shell syntax, and turbo type-check/lint/test (83 tasks). Commit-skill advisory pre-screen reported existing unrelated practice/memory hard signals and was treated as advisory only. Residue: no staged files, active commit queue empty, source bundle clean; only coordination/lifecycle files and comms residue remain. P8-A2 advanced only; P8 not claimed complete.
